name: The Farmers State Bank
description_short: The Farmers State Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank in Holton, KS offering checking accounts, lending services, and digital banking with strong local community involvement.
description_long:
The Farmers State Bank operates as a traditional community bank based in Holton, Kansas, with FDIC insurance backing all deposits. The institution emphasizes personal service and local decision-making typical of community banking institutions, while maintaining modern digital capabilities.

The bank offers multiple checking account tiers (Basic, Go Green, and Plus), online and mobile banking platforms, mobile deposit functionality, bill pay services, and lending products described as featuring "great rates, low fees and flexibility." Account holders receive free email statements and access to both web-based and mobile banking channels. The mobile banking suite includes a downloadable app for iOS and Android, text messaging options, and mobile check deposit via smartphone camera.

What distinguishes The Farmers State Bank is its explicit commitment to community involvement. The bank allocates employee time for volunteering (up to three hours per quarter during work hours), operates the Employee Love Fund (E.L.F.) for community fundraising, and actively sponsors local events and schools. According to their 2025 statistics, they've contributed over $14,000 to community causes and awarded $1,000 in scholarships to local students.

As a community bank, The Farmers State Bank likely serves customers seeking personal relationship banking and local decision-making rather than national scale or premium rewards programs. The digital offerings are functional but not feature-rich compared to larger institutions or neobanks. Geographic service area appears limited to the Kansas region based on the Holton headquarters focus. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Three checking account tiers (Basic, Go Green, Plus)
Online banking through website at www.fsbks.bank
Mobile banking app (iOS via AppStore, Android via Google Play)
Employee volunteer program (3 hours/quarter paid time)
Community fundraising through Employee Love Fund (E.L.F.)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Multiple checking account options (Basic, Go Green, Plus) with free email statements
Mobile banking app available for both iPhone and Android with mobile deposit capability
Free online and mobile banking with bill pay included
Active community involvement with documented volunteer hours and local charitable contributions
Employees receive paid volunteer time (up to 3 hours/quarter) for community service
Community-focused lending with emphasis on local decision-making flexibility
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a regional community bank serving primarily Kansas area
No mention of competitive interest rates on savings or CDs compared to online banks
Mobile deposit requires prior enrollment in online and mobile banking (multi-step process)
No indication of premium banking products, investment services, or wealth management offerings
Unclear service availability outside physical branch location in Holton, KS
best_for: Holton, Kansas residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Customers who value local decision-making and community reinvestment in banking choices
Small business owners and farmers in rural Kansas wanting community bank flexibility
Individuals prioritizing FDIC safety and digital convenience over premium rewards programs
diagnosis: The Farmers State Bank is best for Kansas residents in or near Holton seeking traditional community banking with FDIC safety, modern digital access, and local charitable commitment. The main caveat is limited geographic availability and lack of information about competitive rates, investment services, or availability beyond the home branch.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank in Holton, KS offering checking accounts, lending services, and digital banking with strong community involvement.
